name: analyst-companion
description: Real-time in-person meeting analyst — live transcription with speaker diarization via self-hosted WhisperLiveKit, surfaces live clarifying questions on a Tailscale-only console, answers voice commands using the on-screen Chrome context, and creates reviewed Plane work items at meeting end

interface.shortDescription: Real-time in-person meeting analyst — live transcription with speaker diarization via self-hosted WhisperLiveKit, surfaces live clarifying questions on a Tailscale-only console, answers voice commands using the on-screen Chrome context, and creates reviewed Plane work items at meeting end
interface.longDescription: Real-time in-person meeting analyst — live transcription with speaker diarization via self-hosted WhisperLiveKit, surfaces live clarifying questions on a Tailscale-only console, answers voice commands using the on-screen Chrome context, and creates reviewed Plane work items at meeting end
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the analyst-companion plugin for this task.
